name: mercur
description: Open-source multi-vendor marketplace platform for B2B & B2C. Built on top of MedusaJS. Create your own custom marketplace. 🛍️
readme_summary: Mercur is an open-source, block-based marketplace platform built on MedusaJS, designed for creating custom B2B and B2C marketplaces. It offers full code ownership, a modern tech stack, and a vendor portal, empowering businesses with flexibility and control.
key_features: Block-based architecture for reusable modules and extensions
Dashboard SDK with Vite plugin and file-based routing
CLI for project scaffolding and management
Full code ownership without black-box dependencies
Built on MedusaJS for a modern e-commerce foundation
Customizable storefronts for B2B and B2C
AI-agent friendly design with specific resources
primary_use_case: Building and managing custom multi-vendor e-commerce marketplaces.
cover_image_prompt: A bustling, vibrant marketplace scene where diverse vendors are seamlessly connected to a central, glowing hub labeled 'Mercur'. Each vendor is represented by a distinct stall or shopfront, showcasing unique products. From these stalls, streams of digital data and product icons flow towards the central hub, which then elegantly organizes and distributes them to a diverse crowd of shoppers represented by abstract, friendly figures. Subtle UI elements showing marketplace management dashboards and code snippets are integrated into the background architecture. The overall mood is collaborative and prosperous, with a clean, modern aesthetic. 3D isometric illustration style.

name: twake-drive
readme_summary: Twake Drive is an open-source web application that functions as an alternative to Google Drive, providing robust file management capabilities. It allows users to organize, upload, share files and folders via URLs, and search their content, all within a user-friendly interface.
key_features: File and folder sharing via URLs
primary_use_case: To provide an open-source, self-hosted file management and cloud storage solution as an alternative to proprietary services like Google Drive.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, 3D isometric illustration of a central, stylized digital treehouse labeled 'Twake Drive'. From its branches, digital streams of files and folders flow outwards to various connected homes and offices, symbolizing easy access and sharing. Small, friendly characters are seen uploading files to the treehouse and receiving shared folders via glowing links. Subtle UI elements resembling file explorer windows are integrated into the treehouse structure. The overall mood is collaborative and accessible, with a clean, bright color palette and soft, digital lighting, emphasizing a secure and organized personal cloud storage experience.

name: paperbanana
description: Open source implementation and extension of Google Research’s PaperBanana for automated academic figures, diagrams, and research visuals, expanded to new domains like slide generation.
readme_summary: PaperBanana is an open-source, community-driven implementation for automating the generation of academic illustrations, diagrams, and statistical plots from text descriptions. It extends the original PaperBanana concept with new domains like slide generation and offers a flexible, agentic framework supporting multiple LLM and VLM providers.
key_features: Agentic framework for generating academic diagrams and plots
Supports OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Google Gemini providers
Two-phase multi-agent pipeline with iterative refinement
Multiple VLM and image generation providers
CLI, Python API, and MCP server integration
PDF input support for methodology context
Claude Code skills for code generation and evaluation
primary_use_case: Automated generation of publication-quality academic diagrams, statistical plots, and research visuals from text descriptions.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer in a dimly lit, ancient library, meticulously drawing a complex, glowing map on a large parchment. The map is not of land, but of abstract concepts and data flows, transforming scattered notes and whispered ideas (represented by floating motes of light) into a coherent, beautiful academic diagram. Subtle digital particles emanate from the cartographer's quill, hinting at the AI-driven process. In the background, a small, ethereal screen displays a simplified version of the PaperBanana interface, showing text input and the evolving diagram. The scene is rendered in a detailed digital painting style with a warm, focused spotlight on the cartographer and parchment, emphasizing the transformation of raw information into clear, structured visual knowledge.

name: tiny-gpu
description: A minimal GPU design in Verilog to learn how GPUs work from the ground up
readme_summary: tiny-gpu is a minimal, documented Verilog implementation of a GPU designed to teach hardware-level GPU architecture and parallelization principles. It focuses on core GPGPU concepts rather than graphics-specific features, offering a simplified model for learning.
key_features: Support for kernel simulation & execution traces
Focus on GPGPU principles and parallelization
primary_use_case: Educational tool for learning GPU hardware architecture and parallel processing from the ground up.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman meticulously assembling a miniature, intricate clockwork brain. Gears and wires represent data flowing into the brain, which then outputs streams of perfectly synchronized, glowing digital threads. The craftsman is focused, using specialized tools that subtly resemble code editors. Small, holographic projections around the scene display simple matrix operations. The overall mood is one of focused creation and understanding. The scene is set in a clean, well-lit workshop with a subtle futuristic aesthetic. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing clarity and detail.

name: ChatDev
description: ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration
readme_summary: ChatDev 2.0 (DevAll) is a zero-code multi-agent platform for developing diverse applications by configuring agents and workflows. It evolved from ChatDev 1.0, a virtual software company automating the software development lifecycle through intelligent agent collaboration.
primary_use_case: Enabling users to rapidly build and execute customized multi-agent systems for various development tasks without writing code.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect standing in a bustling, futuristic city square, holding a blueprint that magically transforms into various buildings and structures as digital particles flow from the blueprint. Around the architect, small holographic screens display different types of applications being constructed, such as data visualizations and 3D models. The scene is vibrant and dynamic, with glowing lines connecting different elements, symbolizing agent collaboration. Subtle 'DevAll' branding is integrated into the environment. The overall style is a clean, 3D isometric illustration with a bright, optimistic color palette, emphasizing ease of creation and diverse outcomes.
